label: CU loop • recover after addressing a non-existent mark
notes: Deterministic (scripted-model) recovery case for a bad TARGET (distinct from recover-after-invalid's malformed JSON): the first action addresses mark 9, which doesn't exist, so the loop must feed the unresolved-target back and continue; the scripted recovery then clicks the real Submit and finishes. Runs in CI with no model (scriptedActions set).

scriptedActions: {"verb":"click","target":{"mark":9},"note":"address a mark that does not exist"}
